titlestmt.titleproper: School of Hotel Administration Deans records28-1-4069
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-10 23:11:59 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: School of Hotel Administration Deans records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Dean

did.abstract: Includes correspondence, reports, meeting minutes, distinguished speaker lists, photographs, subject files, and other records of the School of Hotel Administration, particularly pertaining to the Office of the Dean.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, reports, meeting minutes, distinguished speaker lists, photographs, subject files, and other records of the School of Hotel Administration, particularly pertaining to the Office of the Dean.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: School of Hotel Administration Dean's Records, #28-1-4069. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
